purpose: define responsibility split for bounded-slice planner file scopes: cache_update, local_dfg, explanation

behavior: setting local_dfg=true only for Rust/Ruby paths
treating explanation as a side effect of generic path selection
current_runtime_observation.problem: scope names exist, but selection responsibility is still effectively bundled

goals: separate execution-preparation scope from DFG-materialization scope and user-facing explanation scope
make it explicit which files are selected for cache freshness, which for local DFG build, and which for user-visible summary
prepare G7-5 scope-slimming work without confusing selected files and pruned candidates
prepare G7-7 witness explanation work to rely only on explanation-visible files
non_goals: changing public witness wording in this task
promoting pruned candidates into selected file scope

protects: symbol/reference freshness for selected planner inputs
symbol consistency before local DFG build
path companion and fallback resolution freshness

local_dfg.role: edge materialization / local file DFG build

invariants: local_dfg and explanation are independent subsets of cache_update
pruned_candidates must not be promoted into file-level selected scopes

allowed_scope_combinations.example: selected direct boundary file in a language or mode where local DFG is not built
helper file needed for local flow recovery but not worth surfacing in user-facing narration
selected root or bridge completion file actively used in propagation and explanation

disallowed_scope_combinations.reason: local DFG build must sit on top of cache freshness
G7 initial split does not allow explanation-only files

slice_selection_files.meaning: union of files selected for at least one planner scope
slice_selection_files.important_note: files may remain present with explanation=false after G7-5

rules: do not treat as selected files
do not attach to witness file context

tier_guidance.local_dfg: yes when supported and propagation needs it

tier_guidance.explanation: may be true or false depending on whether fallback should be surfaced

promotion_rules: mark_cache_update must not automatically mark explanation
mark_local_dfg must not automatically mark explanation

g7_5: split bundled path selection into scope-specific marks
allow files to remain in slice_selection with explanation=false
state explicitly whether slimming affected local_dfg or explanation scope
g7_7: build witness file context from explanation scope only
compare selected files to pruned_candidates without mixing scopes

decisions: local_dfg and explanation are sibling subsets under cache_update
pruned candidates remain out-of-band from selected file scopes
